title: Consumer lag p99 spikes during partition rebalance
body: During partition rebalance events the consumer lag p99 can spike to 8000+. Suspected: rebalance protocol holding all partitions momentarily. Needs investigation.

title: Add gauge metric for in-flight message count per partition
body: Need a Datadog gauge for per-partition in-flight count so we can alert when lag is building before it becomes critical.

title: Fix context propagation in pgxpool.Acquire under high concurrency
body: Pool exhausts silently when context is not passed explicitly to pgxpool.Acquire. Fix: thread ctx through all pool acquire calls.

title: Worker OOM kill on rcl-worker-02 under high-failure conditions
body: rcl-worker-02 was OOM killed on 2026-12-09. Root cause: unbounded in-memory retry queue under failure cascade. Fix: cap queue depth and add backpressure signal.

title: Add Uintas waypoints to the route database
body: Want to add the Kings Peak loop, Uintas High Route, and Mirror Lake corridor waypoints for the July trip planning.

title: gRPC deadline not forwarded on retries — 2% SLO miss during deploys
body: Interceptor strips the deadline header on retry attempts, causing calls that hit a restarting pod to exceed the SLO. Fix: propagate deadline on all retry attempts.

title: Add request-scoped tracing spans to all gRPC handlers
body: Currently we are missing per-handler span data in Datadog APM. All gRPC handlers need to create a child span from the incoming request context.

title: Upgrade EKS node group to Kubernetes 1.31
body: Current EKS cluster is on 1.29 which reaches end of support in August 2026. Need to upgrade node groups in staging then production.

title: RDS instance not in private subnet in us-west-2
body: Terraform audit found the us-west-2 RDS instance was placed in a public subnet. Move to private subnet and update security group rules.

title: Export gear list as CSV for import into lighterpack.com
body: Add an export command that produces a lighterpack.com-compatible CSV so users can cross-post their lists.

title: Workspace resource delete does not wait for drain to complete
body: When destroying a workspace via Terraform, the provider returns success before the underlying compute nodes finish draining. This can leave orphaned jobs.

title: Add `rcl jobs logs` streaming command
body: Users need a way to tail live job logs from the CLI rather than opening the dashboard. Implement `rcl jobs logs <job-id> --follow`.

title: Shell completion not working on zsh with oh-my-zsh
body: Running `rcl completion zsh` and sourcing the output does not register completions when oh-my-zsh is active. Need to debug autoload conflict.

title: Sliding window counter leaks memory under high unique-key cardinality
body: The sliding window implementation stores a counter per unique key but never evicts old keys. Memory grows unbounded under high cardinality (e.g., per-IP rate limiting with millions of IPs).

title: Refresh token rotation window too short — causes spurious logouts on slow connections
body: Token rotation grace period is 2 seconds. Mobile clients on flaky connections are getting logged out when the rotation request takes longer. Increase grace period to 30s.

title: Etsy listing sync fails when description contains HTML entities
body: The Etsy listing sync CLI panics with an XML parse error when gear descriptions contain & or < characters. Need to sanitize before upload.

title: Rate limiter middleware does not honour X-Forwarded-For behind load balancer
body: When deployed behind an ALB, all requests appear to come from the ALB IP. Rate limiter should use X-Forwarded-For when present and trusted.

title: Support compacted topics for changelog streams
body: Downstream changelog consumers need compacted topics so they can rebuild state from the latest message per key without replaying the full history.

title: Trip planner should show cumulative elevation gain on route preview
body: The route preview map shows distance but not elevation gain. For Wasatch routes elevation is critical for trip planning — add cumulative gain and loss.

title: Add Datadog monitor for RDS free storage dropping below 10%
body: We nearly ran out of RDS storage in May. Need a Datadog monitor that pages on-call when free storage drops below 10% on any production RDS instance.

title: Add cilium drain step to upgrade runbook
body: Add cilium drain step to upgrade runbook. Tracking against my personal dotfiles project.

body: Flaky test in consumer group rebalance. Tracking against my personal trip-planner project.
